title: Marketing (Social Media) Intern
description:
Love scrolling TikTok for inspiration (wink), or keeping tabs on what everyone’s buzzing about on Telegram? 👀 If you’ve ever thought, “eh, I can totally make this go viral” — this might be your calling.


We’re looking for a Marketing Intern who’s excited to create scroll-stopping content, brainstorm fun ideas, and learn the ropes of digital marketing across platforms like Telegram, TikTok, and Instagram. You’ll be part of the team that brings creative campaigns to life — from crafting catchy captions to planning viral-worthy content drops.


This internship is 6 months minimum, with an opportunity to convert to a full-time role if we vibe well together 💅


💡 What You’ll Be Doing:

• Trendspot like a pro — research what’s hot on TikTok and Telegram, and find clever ways to jump on trends before everyone else does
• Plan and create content — from Telegram blasts that people actually read, to TikTok videos that make them stop scrolling
• Brainstorm wild ideas for brand campaigns, events, and online stunts (yes, we like fun ideas here 😎)
• Help execute content calendars — schedule posts, track performance, and make sure every piece goes out on time
• Work closely with the marketing team to plan campaigns, test new formats, and grow our online presence
• Learn tons along the way — from content strategy and social media analytics to the inner workings of a digital media brand


⚡ You’ll Be a Great Fit If You:

• Are obsessed with social media trends and understand what clicks with Singapore audiences
• Have a knack for writing catchy, relatable content that sounds authentic (and not like a robot)
• Know your way around Telegram, TikTok, and Instagram
• Are proactive, self-driven, and a total team player
• Can commit at least 6 months full-time (bonus points if you’re open to staying on permanently after 👀)
• Design guru on Canva, Capcut and Adobe Creative Suite


Check us out:

postedCompany.description:
Confirm Good is a Singapore-based media publishing platform that brings the latest deals, news and happenings to locals in our little red dot.


We offer first-hand information on deals and promotions on a daily basis and we curate and pick out the best deals for our subscribers. We are the first Telegram channel in Singapore to have exclusive partnerships with well-loved brands such as Krispy Kreme, Llao Llao, LiHO, and Tiger Sugar to offer our subscribers giveaways, one-for-one deals, and many other promotions and discounts!


We are expanding to bring our tight-knit community even closer by adding a more personal touch to our offerings through Confirm Good with not only a wider variety of partnerships, but also with articles covering various topics to appeal to a wider demographic.


With well-researched insights and advice spanning a wide range of topics, we seek to deliver simple to understand and beneficial contents for our readers.


We are always on a lookout for talents and we can offer you a broad range of exciting careers of your choice.


To qualify for a full-time position with us, we would prefer it if you have at least 2 years of working experience in a relevant field or if you can impress us with your work. 


If you are really keen to try your hand at something new and don’t have the experience, you can apply for our 6-month Internship Program.


We look forward to hearing from you :)


Don’t worry, Confirm Good Lah!
postedCompany.name: CONFIRM GOOD PTE. LTD.
